meta.name: iCal Event Generator
meta.description: Create .ics calendar events with time zones, recurrence rules, and reminders.

sample.title: Launch review
sample.description: Check timing, owners, and follow-up tasks.

details.title: Event details
details.description: Fill in the summary, notes, and references that calendar apps will show.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Choose the event range, time zone, and export mode.
schedule.allDayHint: All-day end dates stay inclusive in the form and are exported as exclusive ICS end dates.

recurrence.title: Recurrence
recurrence.description: Repeat the event daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Attach one or more display alerts before the event starts.

output.title: ICS output
output.description: Preview the calendar file exactly as it will be downloaded.

validation.endBeforeStart: The end must be after the start.
validation.invalidUntilDate: Enter a valid recurrence end date.
validation.invalidUntilTime: Enter a valid recurrence end time.
